text:
はい、いいでしょう。
今回の特訓はここまで。
もちろん課題はクリア。

まだ実感できないかもしれないけれど
貴方の実力は確実に増しているわ。
私が保証します。

それじゃ、次の特訓も
期待して

Okay, that's enough. That'll be all for boot
camp this time. You cleared the assignment,
of course.

Maybe you don't feel it yet, but you're
definitely improving. I guarantee it.

See you at the next round of boot camp.
I look forward to watching you grow.
